textByHash.cf2928721dd5396317963659598b6d5a5539ebb4: Hello there! Is there anything I can help you with?
textByHash.4e5eec006999fc5cc21c39f5ce9160637a65db7d: Its a little slow... There's a lot of soldiers around these parts, so many people just wear a uniform.
textByHash.cc69e432206e3104de8fe183f221d8181dd789a6: Although, I'm just happy to be here! Osten recently took me on as his assistant, you see. I've always wanted to work in fashion!
textByHash.2b7173376381696eb16f3e4c06bac7a969acc6fc: Anyway, enough about me... Was there something I could help you with? Perhaps a new cape? ...Or a nice new chef's hat?
textByHash.322dda860e7f8b1cdea88a7def93b400a36e583d: I'll be right here if you need anything!
